Naoshi Onizuka - Translated Works
description:
**Naoshi Onizuka**

  
Translated Works

  
Naoshi Onizuka is a japanese artist published under Comic LO. In a similar fashion than Show Higashiyama, several of his works are named after songs - though Higashiyama's titles are mostly inspired by Jazz, and Onizuka's are mostly inspired by contemporary mainstream rock.  
  
He has released 4 tankobons. The first and third one have been fully translated. The second and fourth one are still being worked on.  
  
![Image](http://i.imgur.com/Q0bic.jpg)  
**Life is Peachy?**\[/u\]  
http://www.mangaupdates.com/series.html?id=35799  
Published on May 2005. ISBN 978-4-87182-762-1  
http://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/product/4871827623/  
10 chapters out of 10 translated.  
  
Chapter list:  
Ch.1 - Talk About  
Ch.2 - Lady Madonna  
Ch.3 - Twenty Three O'Clock  
Ch.4 - That's Why They Call It Love  
Ch.5 - Cotton-Tail  
Ch.6 - Saturday night leisure  
Ch.7 - Talk Show On Mute  
Ch.8 - Tsukasa and Tsubasa  
Ch.9 - Sick Sad Little World  
Ch.10 - The Dog And The Lady   
  
![Image](http://i.imgur.com/4FHAV.jpg)  
**One Hot Minute**\[/u\]  
http://www.mangaupdates.com/series.html?id=35801  
Published on January 2007. ISBN 978-4-87182-890-1  
http://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/product/4871828905/  
6 chapters out of 11 translated.  
  
List of translated chapters:  
Ch.1 - You Can't Live on Love Alone  
Ch.2 - Idling STEP  
Ch.3 - Something in the air  
Ch.4 - Siblings Of The Furthest End  
Ch.7 - HONEY  
Ch.9 - Fire cracker   
  
![Image](http://i.imgur.com/oYFkc.jpg)  
**Lovable**\[/u\]  
http://www.mangaupdates.com/series.html?id=40580  
Published on December 2008. ISBN 978-4-86349-044-4  
http://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/product/4863490445/  
10 chapters out of 10 translated  
  
Chapter list:  
Ch.1 - This Is Why I Keep Saying You Can't Live On Love Alone...  
Ch.2 - Hug Hug  
Ch.3 - Ah~ Could You Wait Just A Minute?  
Ch.4 - Smile For You  
Ch.5 - I Never Really Intended To Win  
Ch.6 - Should We Just Go With It?  
Ch.7 - Endearing with the sound turned off  
Ch.8 - Magical Girl Mayuri-chan  
Ch.9 - WINGS FOR YOUR HEART   
  
![Image](http://i.imgur.com/njDnJ.jpg)  
**Porno Graffitti**\[/u\]  
http://www.mangaupdates.com/series.html?id=64166  
Published on February 2011. ISBN 978-4-86349-202-8
